description: Capital formation briefs synthesizing multiple candidates should reference supporting evidence.

output.title: Community solar investment opportunity for urban agriculture coops
output.summary: Two complementary funding leads — a municipal sustainability grant and a community solar program — could jointly support the coop's rooftop garden expansion and energy independence goals.
output.whyItMatters: Combining both leads creates a stronger proposal narrative than either alone, and the deadlines align within the same quarter.
output.suggestedNextStep: Draft a joint proposal outline that shows how solar infrastructure and urban food production reinforce each other.
